title: lolium arvense var. complanatum
intro: Lolium arvense var. complanatum, also known as crested brome or great brome, is a subspecies of Lolium arvense, a type of grass native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lolium arvense var. complanatum include its ability to reduce fever, ease digestive issues, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
